name: Congregation attendance — this Sunday
description: List everyone who came in on the most recent Sunday

name: Congregation attendance — missed this Sunday
description: Members absent from the most recent Sunday service

name: Wilmington attendance
description: Attendance trend for the Wilmington campus

name: Online attendance
description: Attendance trend for the Online campus

name: Hybrid members
description: Members who attend both campuses regularly

name: Attendance trend
description: Rolling attendance averages across both campuses

name: Who is slipping away
description: Members with declining or irregular attendance

name: New members this month
description: People added to the congregation recently

name: Members not seen in 30 days
command: cdb: members not seen in 30 days
description: Active members with no attendance in a month

name: Look up a member
description: Search congregation database for a specific person

name: Pastoral search
description: Search pastoral notes by keyword or name

name: Team overview
description: Summary of all team members, tasks, and activity

name: Stalled tasks
description: Tasks with no movement in 7+ days

name: Task completion rates
description: How each team member is tracking on task completion

name: Inactive leaders
description: Team members with no recent tasks or notes

name: Notes gaps
description: Leaders who haven't had notes written in a while

name: Open follow-ups
description: Unresolved follow-up items across the team

name: Recent meetings
description: Meetings logged in the last 2 weeks

name: Tasks by leader
description: All open tasks assigned to a specific leader

name: Search knowledge base
description: Search sermon transcripts and Bible study notes via ChromaDB

name: KB search — specific topic
description: Find all KB content matching a theological topic

name: Export KB files
description: Download matching KB source documents as a zip via Telegram

name: Web search
command: web: Scot McKnight on the Sermon on the Mount
description: Search the web and return a synthesized answer

name: Image search
command: find image of the Jordan River crossing
description: Search for images and send them via Telegram

name: Bible verse lookup — NIV
description: Look up a scripture passage in NIV, CSB, or NASB

name: Bible verse lookup — CSB
description: Look up a scripture in the Christian Standard Bible

name: Bible passage — multi-verse
description: Retrieve a range of verses from any translation

name: Polish this text
command: polish: The church exists to make disciples who make disciples.
description: Light copy-edit in Dr. Bill's voice — no expansion, no new ideas

name: Send a text message
command: sms: John Smith: Let me know when you're available this week.
description: Send an SMS to a contact (format: sms: Name: message)

name: Add a Catalyst task
command: task: Prepare elder meeting agenda for Thursday
description: Add a task to the Catalyst task list

name: Remind me
command: remind: Call the Johnsons about the baptism date
description: Save a reminder to the active reminders list

name: Timed reminder
command: remind me at 2pm to follow up with the Hendersons
description: Set a reminder with a specific time

name: Book an appointment
command: book an appointment with Mark Davis mark@email.com next Wednesday
description: Find an open slot and book a calendar event via Google Calendar

name: Block focus time
command: block 90 minutes for sermon prep Thursday morning
description: Reserve a block on the calendar for deep work

name: Check today's calendar
description: View today's scheduled events

name: Check calendar availability
description: See open time slots on a given day

name: Generate a QR code
command: generate a qr code for https://williamckyomes.com
description: Create a QR code and send it via Telegram

name: Email QR code
command: email this qr to John Smith
description: Send the last-generated QR code to a contact's email

name: Look up a contact
description: Find phone, email, and campus for a congregation member

name: Writing Room — approve applicant
description: Approve a Writing Room application, generate credentials, send welcome email

name: Writing Room — deny applicant
description: Deny a Writing Room application

name: State of the Church report
description: Generate and email the full State of the Church HTML report

name: Wrap up session
description: Save current session to Watson memory and summarize the conversation

name: System status
description: Check Watson system health, disk, memory, and running services

name: Check logs
description: View the last 50 lines of the Watson log

name: Git pull Watson
description: Pull latest changes from GitHub into the Watson repo

name: Restart Watson bot
description: Restart the watson-bot.service systemd service

name: Restart dashboard
description: Restart the watson-dashboard.service systemd service

name: Dev Loop — trigger build
command: devloop: add a GET /api/status/extended endpoint that returns uptime and last cron run
description: Send a build spec to the FMSPC Dev Loop for autonomous code generation

name: Pastoral note — direct
command: pastoral note: Spoke with James after service — struggling with job loss. Praying for peace.
description: Save a pastoral note directly without a post-meeting prompt

name: Congregation member count
description: Quick count of total congregation members in the database

name: Active task count
description: Count of currently active tasks across all categories

name: Shepherding report
description: Members overdue for pastoral contact based on attendance history

name: Run Conflict Check
description: Run the member conflict report now — sends any pending conflicts to Telegram with merge buttons
